summary: Defines Glynn-Fox metro LAUS series-ID constants and builders for BLS annual labor-market ingestion.
Lazy public API for ACS ingestion, translation, and aggregation helpers that preserves the root import surface without statically coupling the package to its child modules.
Compatibility facade that forwards legacy hhplab.measures.acs imports to the ACS-owned aggregation implementation in hhplab.acs.aggregate.
Verifies the refactored source package entrypoints and lazy root exports for HUD, Census, NHGIS, and PIT surfaces.
Comprehensive regression test package covering CLI behavior, ingest paths, crosswalks, metro definitions, recipes, panel assembly, and output contracts across the codebase.
Shared Census MSA geography package that parses official delineation files, writes curated MSA definition artifacts, and validates the identifier/membership contract for later pipeline stages.

Parses the Census July 2023 CBSA delineation workbook into normalized rows, filters to metropolitan statistical areas, and builds canonical MSA definition and county-membership tables keyed by 5-digit MSA/CBSA codes.

Downloads the official Census MSA delineation workbook, retains a raw snapshot, records source-registry metadata, writes curated MSA definition artifacts, and provides read/validate helpers for the new artifact family.

Validates curated MSA definitions and county-membership tables, enforcing the current contract that the canonical MSA ID equals the 5-digit CBSA code and that only metropolitan rows appear in the artifact family.
Exports the public MSA definition, IO, and validation helpers so other packages can depend on a single shared Census MSA geography surface.
Adds the hhplab generate msa CLI command, including non-interactive artifact generation, overwrite protection, and JSON output for automation-friendly MSA artifact setup.
Regression tests for the MSA workbook parser, metro-only filtering, MSA definition and county-membership builders, and validation failures such as malformed IDs or orphan membership rows.
Covers the canonical filename and path builders for the new MSA definition artifact family under data/curated/msa.
Exercises the hhplab generate msa CLI in JSON mode with a patched artifact writer so the automation-facing contract is validated without a live Census download.
